step_rationale: Gαq platelet signaling; central to platelet activation in thrombosis.
mechanism: GNAQ encodes a Gαq protein essential for platelet signaling and thrombus formation, directly driving the thrombotic occlusion phase of Type 1 MI.

references.title: Spontaneous Abortion and Myocardial Infarction: A Mendelian Randomization Investigation and Transcriptomic Analysis.
Role of heterotrimeric G proteins in platelet activation and clot formation in platelets treated with integrin αIIbβ3 inhibitor.
